allow: PowerShell($logFile = "C:\\Users\\Pc\\OneDrive\\Bureau\\APP GESTION\\frontend-dev.log"; Clear-Content $logFile -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c", "cd /d `"C:\\Users\\Pc\\OneDrive\\Bureau\\APP GESTION\\frontend`" && npm run dev >> `"$logFile`" 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "Frontend restarted")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Companies:', [c['name'] for c in d.get\('data',[]\)]\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/companies -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/v1/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\\"email\\":\\"admin@assurancesoueedzem.ma\\",\\"password\\":\\"Admin@2024!\\"}')

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/login.json'\); const t=d.data.accessToken; require\('child_process'\).execSync\('curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/companies -H \\"Authorization: Bearer '+t+'\\"', {stdio:'inherit'}\)")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@assurancesoueedzem.ma","password":"Admin@2024!"}' -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $login.data.accessToken; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/v1/companies" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Companies in DB:"; $r.data | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  -" $_.name })

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const t=JSON.parse\(d\).data.accessToken; require\('child_process'\).exec\('curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/payments?limit=5 -H \\"Authorization: Bearer '+t+'\\"', \(e,o\)=>console.log\('payments:',o.substring\(0,200\)\)\); require\('child_process'\).exec\('curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/accounting?limit=5 -H \\"Authorization: Bearer '+t+'\\"', \(e,o\)=>console.log\('accounting:',o.substring\(0,200\)\)\);}\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('accessToken','ERREUR'\)[:50] if 'data' in d else d\)")
